seoTitle: Newcastle vs Newcastle East — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Newcastle and Newcastle East. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Newcastle vs Newcastle East: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Newcastle and Newcastle East.
heading: Newcastle vs Newcastle East — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Newcastle, New South Wales and Newcastle East, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Newcastle has a lower overall climate risk score (37/100) compared to Newcastle East (46/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Newcastle or Newcastle East safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Newcastle has a flood risk score of 28/100, while Newcastle East scores 35/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Newcastle scores 40/100 for bushfire risk. Newcastle East scores 46/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Newcastle or Newcastle East?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Newcastle has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 2.33% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
